description: You are the Chief Curator at a historical society preparing to pitch a new special exhibition ('The Iron Web: Rails and Telegraphs') to the Board of Trustees. Assemble an 8-slide exhibition proposal presentation in ONLYOFFICE Presentation Editor using the text and images located in `~/Documents/Presentations/exhibition_assets/`. The presentation must include: a title slide ('The Iron Web: Rails and Telegraphs') with subtitle ('Fall 2026 Exhibition Proposal') and speaker notes regarding Miller Foundation funding; an overview slide with bullet points from the master text; four individual artifact slides containing the artifact name, corresponding image, and description; a 'Proposed Floor Plan' slide with the gallery image; and a 'Budget Breakdown' slide containing a table with the financial data from the master text (Curation: $45,000, Fabrication: $85,000, Marketing: $20,000, Total: $150,000). Save the final file as `~/Documents/Presentations/exhibition_proposal.pptx`.
